title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: libnftnl bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for libnftnl is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

full_text:
An update for libnftnl is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
